last_cycle_summary: Heartbeat follow-up completed a secondary public-doc wording sweep. Updated remaining old first-pack labels in Hermes notes, workflow templates, local-first runtime, and product status; added docs/public_wording_checklist.md as a guardrail. Changes remain documentation-only and do not remove implemented features.
positioning_changes: Defined one-line positioning: Aletheia is a local-first agent harness for sensitive professional document work.
Reframed legal as founder/domain insight and the first domain pack rather than the whole product category.
Defined Aletheia Kernel as Local Vault, Agent Loop Runtime, Typed Artifact Graph, Permission + Tool Policy, Review + Gate Console, Audit Trace, Eval Replay, and Human-approved Skills.
Defined Domain Packs for Contract / Due Diligence Review, Compliance Obligation, Audit Evidence, Regulatory Response, and Litigation Chronology.
Made Private Contract / Due Diligence Review the first public/private-pilot domain pack.
Added Codex and Hermes analogies while preserving expert review, gates, audit, eval, and local-first boundaries.
Flagged internal development wording that should be removed from public-facing docs.
Updated public docs to lead with the local-first sensitive-work harness and Codex analogy.
Added public Kernel and first domain-pack docs.
Added a public wording checklist for future README, demo, pitch, and reviewer-facing doc changes.
Replaced remaining old first-pack labels in selected secondary public docs.
risks: Secondary docs may still need opportunistic cleanup if they are promoted into public reviewer paths later.
Some docs still list legal, compliance, audit, due diligence, and regulatory workflows as examples; they should remain Domain Packs rather than the top-level category.
Internal .agentops files contain cycle, heartbeat, owner-thread, and worktree coordination language that should not leak into public docs.

The repository remains a local/private-pilot candidate; stronger production SaaS or compliance readiness claims would require additional implementation, security review, operations, and validation evidence.
next_actions: Use docs/public_wording_checklist.md before future README, pitch, demo, or reviewer-facing doc edits.
Create docs/local_first_boundary.md, docs/review_gate_audit_eval_loop.md, docs/public_demo_path.md, and docs/non_goals.md if a more complete public documentation set is needed.
Keep implemented legal, compliance, audit, regulatory, eval, gates, and skills features, but regroup them under Kernel capabilities and Domain Packs.
Before any public demo or investor readme pass, remove or isolate internal wording such as this thread, heartbeat, supervisor cycle, owner thread, and dirty worktree.
